note: Slingshot indicator added below Anti-Stall. Mirrors the existing anti-stall pattern: status pill + detail line, both updated every fetchInfo tick. States: PRE-FORK (height < 7000) / OFF (gate 1 closed: prev block within target) / ARMED (gate 1 open, gate 2 not yet fired — shows countdown to fire) / FIRING -12.5% (both gates open: bitsQ already relieved on this block). Detail line shows prev_elapsed, current_elapsed, and the deficit/remaining. New _paramTexts.slingshot explains the dual-gate spec, the why behind two gates, the four indicator states, and that Slingshot does NOT replace cASERT/cascade/lottery/SbPoW. Globals exposed: _prevBlockInterval (= times[0]-times[1]) and _chainTipHeight (= info.blocks). Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
